1794560.name: Blockremental
1794560.description:
🌋Dive into the depths, build your destiny, face the dragon.🐉

Blockremental is an incremental game blending management, combat, exploration, and strategy, where you control a self-operating drilling platform diving into the core of a mysterious and perilous island. You play as the son of Mikia, a vanished goddess, entrusted with a sacred mission: uncover the secrets of an ancient prison and defeat Nefarok, the slumbering dragon threatening the world.

🌟An epic quest in a living world

Each meter you dig reveals rare resources, diverse environments—fractured rocks, shimmering water pockets, glowing lava chambers—and growing dangers. The dragon's golems, massive and relentless, emerge to protect their master. The deeper you go, the stronger they become. Your goal: reach the sealed cavern, cool the scorching air, and confront Nefarok in a final battle that spans from the depths all the way to the floating islands above.☁️

🛠️ Build, upgrade, survive

Your platform is your greatest ally—a mobile refuge, an automation workshop, and a fortress. Extract resources to unlock new machines, boost your defenses, and discover unique abilities. Every decision matters. Optimize your strategy to dig efficiently, repel enemy waves, or prepare for the final showdown. Will you find the hidden artifacts scattered across the island to tip the scales against Nefarok? 🔍

♾️ Endless replayability, limitless strategy

Blockremental offers an experience where every descent is unique. Try bold setups, discover the best routes to the cavern, and sharpen your tactics to take down the dragon. A final score evaluates your efficiency, encouraging you to refine your approach. Whether cautious or daring, methodical or aggressive, every playstyle reveals new facets of the island and its secrets.

🌿 A calming adventure for everyone

With its serene atmosphere, soft visuals, and gradually unfolding story, Blockremental is designed for players of all ages. Explore at your own pace in a living world, accompanied by gentle animals and a soothing soundtrack, even as the mysteries deepen. Free of graphic violence, the story reveals itself layer by layer, leading to the final confrontation with Nefarok.

Dive into Blockremental and forge your legend. The island is waiting. So is the dragon.

✨ Key Features

  • ✅ Incremental gameplay: Manage, automate, and optimize your platform to progress.

  • ✅ Strategic exploration: Discover resources, artifacts, and unique environments at every level.

  • ✅ Endless replayability: Experiment with varied strategies to defeat Nefarok as efficiently as possible.

  • ✅ Immersive atmosphere: A living world, soothing visuals, and captivating storytelling.

  • ✅ Accessible to all: A non-violent experience suitable for players of all ages.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
